ohtani.title: Freeman's clutch home run lifts Dodgers in 5-4 win
ohtani.blurb: Freddie Freeman hits a two-run home run and Shohei Ohtani strikes out five in the Dodgers' 5-4 win over the Rays

imanaga.title: Pete Crow-Armstrong's cycle highlights walk-off win
imanaga.blurb: Pete Crow-Armstrong hits MLB's first cycle of 2026 and Matt Shaw walks it off in the Cubs' 5-4 win over the Rockies

suzuki.title: Seven-run 2nd inning fuels Cubs' offense in 8-6 win
suzuki.blurb: Chicago brings home seven runs in the 2nd and Pete Crow-Armstrong adds his third homer of the series in the Cubs' 8-6 win over the Rockies

yoshida.title: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. drives in two in Blue Jays' win
yoshida.blurb: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. knocks in two runs to power the Blue Jays to a 3-0 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. drives in two in Blue Jays' win
okamoto.blurb: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. knocks in two runs to power the Blue Jays to a 3-0 win over the Red Sox

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Andre Pallante strikes out six in Cardinals' win
matsui.blurb: Andre Pallante strikes out six batters and JJ Wetherholt records three hits in the Cardinals' 3-2 win over the Padres
